tests.source_program:
define i32 @shl_direct_pattern(i32 %val) {
entry:
  %div = udiv i32 %val, 10
  %shl = shl i32 %div, 4
  %rem = urem i32 %val, 10
  %or = or disjoint i32 %shl, %rem
  ret i32 %or
}
tests.expect_optimized_program:
define i32 @shl_direct_pattern(i32 %val) {
entry:
  %div = udiv i32 %val, 10
  %reass.mul = mul nuw i32 %div, 6
  %reass.add = add i32 %val, %reass.mul
  ret i32 %reass.add
}
